required_variables: Two scale variables; correlation objective selected.
planner_behavior: Pearson when both variables are marked normal; Spearman otherwise. Nominal predictors are excluded from correlation-only routing.
result_table: Variable pair, n, Pearson r or Spearman rho, p-value; CI when available.
graph: Scatter plot with the paired variables.
interpretation_safety: Report correlation/association only; do not claim causality.

required_variables: Explicit outcome plus confirmed predictors; linear for scale outcome, binary logistic for binary outcome with adequate events.
planner_behavior: Runs only for regression/prediction objective or explicit multivariable confirmation. Low EPV becomes recommended-only.
result_table: Coefficient/OR table with CI and p-value when runner returns estimates.
graph: Forest plot only when OR/HR estimates and confidence intervals exist.
interpretation_safety: Use adjusted wording only for adjusted models that actually ran.

required_variables: Time-to-event variable plus event/censoring variable; optional group/predictors.
planner_behavior: Kaplan-Meier/log-rank or Cox only when time and event variables are detected/confirmed. Prognostic wording alone is not sufficient.
result_table: Survival summaries and hazard ratios when implemented runners complete.
graph: Kaplan-Meier curve or Cox forest plot when implemented result exists.
interpretation_safety: Do not fabricate survival results when time/event variables are missing.

required_variables: Ordered time/date/index variable plus repeated observations and explicit time-series objective.
planner_behavior: Marked unavailable/recommended-only; no fake ARIMA/forecast result is executed.
graph: Line chart recommended only when implemented in a later batch.
interpretation_safety: Do not report trend/forecast statistics unless an implemented time-series model runs.

required_variables: Scale variable compared across exactly two independent groups.
planner_behavior: Welch's t-test for approximately normal scale comparisons.
result_table: Group n/means, mean difference, Welch df, CI, t, p, Cohen's d.
graph: Boxplot or strip/box plot by group.
interpretation_safety: Report mean difference; no causal language.

required_variables: Continuous or ordinal variable compared across two independent groups with non-normal/ordinal data.
planner_behavior: Selected when two-group scale comparison is not normal.
result_table: Group n, median/IQR where available, U, p, rank-biserial effect size.
interpretation_safety: Discuss distribution/median difference, not mean difference.

required_variables: Continuous or ordinal variable compared across 3+ independent groups with non-normal/ordinal data.
planner_behavior: Selected for non-normal multi-group scale comparisons.
result_table: H statistic, df/n where available, p-value; post-hoc only if implemented/confirmed.
interpretation_safety: State that at least one group differs only when significant; avoid uncorrected pairwise claims.

required_variables: Significant omnibus ANOVA or equivalent supported post-hoc trigger.
planner_behavior: Tukey HSD is executable after parametric one-way ANOVA; Dunn/non-parametric post-hoc remains unavailable unless explicitly implemented.
result_table: Comparison, difference, CI/p-value, and correction method when returned.
graph: Optional comparison chart; not required for routing.
interpretation_safety: Correction method must be shown; no uncorrected final pairwise claims.

required_variables: Same subjects measured at 3+ timepoints/conditions, subject ID, within factor, continuous outcome.
planner_behavior: Repeated-measures ANOVA only with subject and within metadata; Friedman for wide non-normal timepoint columns when available; otherwise unavailable.
result_table: Omnibus repeated-measures/Friedman summary when runner completes.
graph: Line plot by timepoint recommended only when implemented.
interpretation_safety: Note sphericity limitation if not checked.

required_variables: Two rater columns assessing the same subjects.
planner_behavior: Cohen's kappa for nominal/binary ratings; weighted kappa for ordinal ratings; ICC for continuous ratings.
result_table: Kappa/ICC value, CI, p-value if available, interpretation.
interpretation_safety: Agreement strength only; not diagnostic accuracy.

required_variables: Two continuous paired measurement method/rater columns.
planner_behavior: Routed with ICC/Bland-Altman for continuous paired rater/method columns.
result_table: Mean bias and lower/upper limits of agreement.
graph: Bland-Altman plot when paired continuous data are available.

planner_behavior: Recommended only for logistic/Cox-style effect estimates; not a statistical test.
graph: Forest plot with reference line at 1 for OR/HR or 0 for beta when supported.
interpretation_safety: Do not show forest plot without effect estimates and CI.

required_variables: Scale/ordinal variable compared across categorical groups.
planner_behavior: Recommended for t-test, Mann-Whitney, ANOVA, and Kruskal-Wallis comparisons.
interpretation_safety: Visual support only; final claim must match the statistical test.
